title: Deep Suite Artifact Envelope
description: Common envelope for cross-plugin JSON artifacts. Producers wrap their domain payload in this envelope so consumers (deep-dashboard, suite tooling) can validate, trace, and aggregate uniformly. Phased rollout per plugin in M3.

^x-.description: Reserved forward-compat extension namespace at envelope root level.

schema_version.description: Locked to 1.0 for envelope v1. Same lock-not-additive policy as suite-extensions schema. Forward-compat additions go through `x-*` patternProperties (root + envelope block); breaking changes require new schema file (artifact-envelope-v2.schema.json).

^x-.description: Reserved forward-compat extension namespace inside envelope block.

producer.description: Plugin name (strict kebab-case, matches sidecar plugin keys).

producer_version.description: SemVer 2.0.0 strict (official recommended regex). Accepts MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH, optional prerelease (`-1.2.3-alpha.1`), and optional build metadata (`+commit.abc`). Rejects leading-zero numerics (`01.0.0`) and empty prerelease ids (`1.2.3-..`). Matches plugin.json.version source-of-truth policy (CLAUDE.md §Conventions).

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this artifact's producing run (e.g., ULID).

session_id.description: Optional. Higher-level session this run belongs to.

parent_run_id.description: Optional. Producer's parent in cross-plugin trace tree (e.g., deep-review run links back to deep-work session-receipt run_id). Forward-compat for M4 telemetry trace assembly.

version.description: Payload schema MAJOR.MINOR (independent from envelope schema_version).

head.description: Git SHA hex (7–40 chars). Empty/non-hex strings rejected.

dirty.description: Working tree state at artifact generation. 'unknown' allowed when generator (e.g., shallow CI clone) cannot determine state.

additionalProperties.description: Either a plain version string (e.g., '20.11.0') or a structured object (e.g., { version, arch, build }).

payload.description: Plugin-specific content. Validated against producer's domain schema (out of scope here).
